# SecurePass Password Generator - Project Instructions

## Project Overview
Building a production-ready, modern Password Generator web application using React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion with full feature set including password strength meter, history, theme toggle, and accessibility support.

## Tech Stack
- React 19
- Vite
- JavaScript (No TypeScript)
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion
- React Icons
- Lucide Icons
- React Hot Toast
- ESLint

## Project Status
- [x] Scaffolding setup
- [x] Project structure created
- [x] All components built
- [x] Hooks implemented
- [x] Styling and animations configured
- [x] Features implemented
- [x] Accessibility configured
- [x] Responsive design complete
- [x] SEO meta tags added
- [x] README documentation complete

## Setup Instructions
```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Build for Production
```bash
npm run build
npm run preview
```

## Deployment
Ready to deploy on Vercel with no modifications needed.
